title: Membership
subtitle: Become part of our growing Ukrainian community in Norway
individualDesc: Perfect for individuals looking to connect and integrate
familyDesc: Best for families looking to stay connected
contactDesc: For businesses and organizations wanting to support
cancellationTerms: There is no binding period, and if you wish to stop your regular deduction agreement, please contact us at phone +47 912 54 807 or email mrija.i.drammen@gmail.com
vippsConsent: Vipps will ask for permission to share your name, email, and phone number before payment.
vippsStartError: We could not start Vipps right now. Please try again.
paymentCompleteDescription: Your Vipps payment is captured and your membership has been registered.
paymentPendingDescription: We are waiting for Vipps to confirm the payment and finish the membership registration.
paymentFailedDescription: Vipps reported that the payment was canceled, expired, or otherwise not completed.
paymentErrorTitle: We could not verify the payment yet
paymentErrorDescription: Please try again in a moment. If the payment has already gone through, it is usually enough to refresh the status.
missingReferenceTitle: We could not find the payment reference.
missingReferenceDescription: Please return to the membership section and start the Vipps payment again.
storageWarning: The payment is confirmed, but automatic saving to the registration list needs one more setup step.
statusLoadError: We could not verify your Vipps payment right now.
paymentPageSeoDescription: Follow the Vipps membership payment and registration status.
